lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows signs of significant wear. Mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance soon.

Get ready for your next adventure with this fantastic ride! It's in great shape and has been clearly well-loved over the years. You'll find it runs smoothly and reliably, making every trip a pleasure. While it shows some very minor, typical wear from careful use, it remains a solid and attractive choice for anyone looking for quality and value. Come see why this dependable beauty is ready for many more miles!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior retains a strong shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front fascia and a small scuff on the driver-side mirror housing. Inside, the interior is clean and smoke-free; the seats show only light bolstering wear, and all electronic components, including the backup camera and Bluetooth system, function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is sound with a documented service history, smooth shifting, and responsive braking. It is a reliable choice for anyone looking for a quality vehicle that is ready for daily use.
The car is in good condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior are in like-new condition with no visible wear or damage. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and operate perfectly.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver. The exterior shows typical wear for its age, including some noticeable paint scratches and a small ding on the passenger door. Inside, the cabin is clean but the seats show some minor staining and visible wear. Mechanically, the car runs and drives well, though the brakes will likely need attention soon and the air conditioning is not as cold as it once was. It is a functional and honest car for someone looking for reliable transportation at a reasonable price.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in pristine, showroom-level condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and absolute mechanical integrity. Every detail has been meticulously preserved to ensure a driving experience that mirrors its original factory specifications. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m so excited to get this absolute gem to its next owner. This car is in truly stunning condition—honestly, it’s like stepping back in time to the day it was first bought! It’s been babied since day one, kept tucked away in a garage, and it still has that fresh, new-car feel. You won’t find a single scratch or dent anywhere. It’s a total dream to drive and looks absolutely pristine. I’d love for you to come see it for yourself!

Offering a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure VANOS system, delivering 333 hp to an 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed via a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and an M Variable Differential Lock for optimal mechanical grip. The chassis has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including rear subframe reinforcement and rod bearing replacement. The suspension geometry remains factory-spec, providing the quintessential analog feedback these E46 units are renowned for. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, this vehicle represents a turn-key investment for the discerning enthusiast seeking peak longitudinal and lateral performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior finish is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely no swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel is original and perfectly aligned. Inside, the cabin remains in a 'time-capsule' state; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, the bolsters are firm, and the interior still carries that new-car scent. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation, operates with precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history with every maintenance interval performed exclusively by master technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it was manufactured, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a masterpiece of preservation.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle maintains its original showroom luster, reflecting a history of meticulous preservation and fastidious ownership. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, every detail adheres to the highest standards of excellence. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands unparalleled quality and mechanical perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been maintained to the highest standards of excellence. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail reflects a level of care reserved for the most discerning collectors. We invite you to experience this unparalleled example of engineering and luxury.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? You’ve found it! This beauty has been my absolute pride and joy, kept tucked away in a garage and pampered since day one. It’s in truly flawless shape—honestly, you won’t find a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere. It drives like an absolute dream, and I promise you’ll fall in love the second you see it in person. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This exemplary specimen features the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power delivery and a stratospheric 8,000 RPM redline. Meticulously maintained, the VANOS system has been overhauled, and the rear subframe has been structurally reinforced for maximum torsional rigidity. The chassis remains exceptionally taut with Bilstein dampers, while the Getrag 6-speed manual provides precise, tactile engagement. Boasting a concours-level finish and an immaculate cabin with zero bolster wear, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of analog driver engagement.
Pristine condition. No scratches or dents. Interior like new. Low mileage. Service records included.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, meticulously maintained in showroom condition since the day it was driven off the lot. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero chips, scratches, or imperfections, while the interior remains pristine, featuring supple, uncreased leather and that unmistakable new-car scent. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships, and I have the complete, comprehensive documentation to prove its flawless maintenance history. Mechanically, it operates exactly as it did on day one—silent, powerful, and incredibly smooth. It has been strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover and has never seen inclement weather. Included are all original manuals, two sets of keys, and the unused premium floor mats. If you are looking for a car that looks and feels completely untouched by time, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a level of care that meets the expectations of the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, confirms its status as a premier example of its class. This is an investment in uncompromising quality and performance.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards and preserved in showroom condition. This unit boasts a flawless aesthetic profile and mechanical integrity that will satisfy the most exacting requirements of a sophisticated buyer. An acquisition of this caliber offers a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this one go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy this absolute gem! It’s in seriously pristine, mint condition—honestly looks and smells brand new. I’ve babied it since day one, and it drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
This 2001 BMW M3 (E46) is a meticulously preserved specimen of Bavarian engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS. Power is
Pristine condition. One owner. Full service records. No accidents. Garage kept. Everything works perfectly.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom quality, preserved in a climate-controlled environment and maintained with an open checkbook. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin retains its new-car scent; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the high-definition displays remain crystal clear without a single scratch. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a full service history from authorized specialists and providing a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line. Every electronic component, from the adaptive cruise control to the premium sound system, functions flawlessly. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a turn-key, investment-grade example that truly stands apart from the rest.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Meticulously preserved and mechanically peerless, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber and investment-grade quality.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it presents in showroom condition with flawless aesthetics and peak mechanical integrity. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen of unrivaled caliber.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied it since day one, kept it garaged, and stayed on top of every single service. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. You won't find another one this clean! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This FD3S RX-7 is a peerless example of 90s JDM engineering, maintained to an exacting standard. The 13B-REW power plant retains its factory sequential twin-turbocharger configuration, delivering a linear torque curve and exceptional throttle response. Recent compression tests show healthy, consistent pulses across all rotor faces. The chassis remains incredibly rigid, supported by a factory-spec double-wishbone suspension and a Torsen limited-slip differential that ensures surgical turn-in precision. Every bushing, vacuum line, and thermal shield has been inspected and replaced with OEM components where necessary to preserve the car’s original kinematic harmony. This is a true collector-grade specimen with zero mechanical deficit.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Full maintenance records. Garage stored. Clean title.

Presenting a showroom-quality masterpiece that defines the standard for a 'mint' pre-owned vehicle. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. The interior is equally immaculate, featuring pristine leather that still carries a factory-fresh scent, with every button and electronic system operating exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, benefiting from an exhaustive service history performed exclusively by master technicians at authorized dealerships. It has never seen inclement weather, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. For the buyer who demands perfection, this car offers a brand-new driving experience with the pedigree of a well-loved collector's item. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and service records.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen exhibits pristine exterior surfaces and an immaculate interior, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original showroom state. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle in flawless condition.
